goals.title: Add a Start a Goal workflow
goals.description: Future feature: select a Project Goal and ask the agent to create a Session Task checklist for it.

goals.title: Add manual task promotion
goals.description: Future feature: manually turn a Session Task into a Project Goal.

goals.title: Add archived-goal browsing
goals.description: Future feature: preserve completed Project Goals without showing them normally.

goals.title: Add focus mode
goals.description: Future feature: show only Session Tasks linked to the active Project Goal.

goals.title: Add progress history
goals.description: Future feature: record which Pi sessions contributed to a Project Goal.

goals.title: Add read-only Project Goals
goals.description: Future feature: let teams commit a roadmap that the agent can read but not mutate automatically.

goals.title: Re-evaluate nested tasks
goals.description: Intentionally avoided initially; revisit only with compelling evidence.
